docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARRILLO YVETTE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WOO TANYA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM NOV-02-1994 TO NOV-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARRILLO YVETTE HEARING SET FOR NOV-02-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARRILLO YVETTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOO TANYA $70.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $90.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY CARRILLO YVETTE AS TO DEFENDANT WOO TANYA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-19-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
CONTINUANCE REQUEST BY DEFENDANT ON MOTION TO VACATE HEARING, MANUALLY RESERVED FOR NOV 14-94 AT 8:00 AM.SENT UP TO DEPT.6 F/JUDGE'S SIGNATURE
CERT. LETTER TO TANYA WOO RETURNED REFUSED.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF NOV-14-1994, GRANTED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WOO TANYA
